name: Mosaic Artificial Leaf in White Pot - Room Essentials™
description:
Infuse your space with a sense of cosmopolitan luxury with this Mosaic Artificial Leaf in Pot from Room Essentials™. This artificial arrangement features a realistic-looking mosaic plant and comes housed in a white melamine pot with faux soil filler for instant display. Place it on a side or console table with other real or faux plants to create a relaxing indoor garden.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
